metadata.purpose: Controlled vocabulary for contract types and framework categories

Gate.description: Validation, pass/fail enforcement, drift checks, invariant verification
Gate.responsibility: Binary decision making with evidence; blocks progression on failure

Phase.description: Multi-step transformation or staged enrichment with inputs/outputs/invariants
Phase.responsibility: Transform data from one shape to another with contract guarantees

Mutation.description: Patch/apply/update/change to SSOT with rollback capability
Mutation.responsibility: Write to governed registry with mutation-safety contract

Executor.description: Orchestration, task launching, lifecycle control, result envelope management
Executor.responsibility: Coordinate multi-phase execution with deterministic handoffs

input_contract.description: Required inputs present and valid before execution

identity_contract.description: file_id resolution and canonicalization; entity identity consistency
identity_contract.enforcement: Identity validation before mutation or promotion

output_result_envelope_contract.description: Consistent result shape between components; predictable handoff format
output_result_envelope_contract.example_violation: pipeline_runner expects wrapped data key but gets flat dict (FCA-001)

evidence_contract.description: Artifacts proving execution outcome; audit trail requirements
evidence_contract.example_violation: e2e_validator does not enforce evidence artifacts (FCA-003)

pass_fail_criteria_contract.description: Binary gate decision rules; deterministic pass/fail conditions
pass_fail_criteria_contract.example_violation: e2e_validator checks structure but not policy invariants (FCA-003)

mutation_safety_contract.description: Lock, backup, rollback before writes; write-path ownership
mutation_safety_contract.example_violation: doc_id_resolver has no write path to registry (FCA-006)

rollback_contract.description: Undo artifacts required before commit; revert capability
rollback_contract.enforcement: Rollback artifacts generated before mutation applied
rollback_contract.example_violation: No rollback mechanism defined for any mutation script

fingerprint_idempotency_contract.enforcement: Fingerprint check before execution; skip if match found
